rules: Use mono font for financial figures and transaction IDs where alignment matters.
Never center-align paragraphs; prioritize left-alignment for data and forms.
Avoid pure black or pure white except for card surfaces.
Use primary color (Moss Green) sparingly for main CTAs and positive balances.
Use danger color (Terracotta) for expenses or destructive actions.
Text contrast must meet at least 4.5:1.

structure: Top Row: 3 summary cards (col-span-1 each on lg, col-span-full on mobile).
Middle Row: Main Chart (col-span-2 on lg), Category Pie Chart (col-span-1 on lg).
Left side: Full height image with subtle vignette or solid background if image fails.
Right side: Vertically centered, narrow container (max-w-md) with generous padding.

padding_rules: Containers with borders must use p-6 or p-8 to prevent text collision.
Use p-12 for section containers if outside the dashboard view (like login).

properties.inputs: bg-transparent border-stone-300 rounded-sm focus:border-moss-green focus:ring-1 focus:ring-moss-green/50

libraries: Shadcn UI (Cards, Tables, Forms, Input, Button, Dropdown Menu)

customizations.charts: Use Recharts. Set colors to match palette (Moss for income, Terracotta for expense). Remove grid lines or make them very subtle (stone-100).
customizations.tables: Use Shadcn Table. Left-align text, right-align numbers. Use small mono font for IDs.
customizations.navigation: Sidebar or top nav with clear role indication (Admin vs User). Active link should have a subtle background (stone-100) and bolder text, not a bright neon color.

login_hero_abstract.description: Abstract minimalist architectural shapes in warm sand and terracotta tones. Use on the left side of the split login screen.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='total-income-value').

developer_instructions: Do not use generic Inter font. Import Manrope and IBM Plex Sans via Google Fonts.
Implement the UI with strict adherence to the colors and typography defined here.
Ensure all Shadcn components are modified to have 'rounded-sm' instead of default rounded corners.
Keep animations to micro-interactions (hover, focus, active states). No massive scroll animations for the dashboard.
Implement Role-Based Access Control UI cues (e.g., hiding 'User Management' link for non-admins).
